title: Command Debug Service
description: This is a mod that provides a method to execute and debug Minecraft commands by external programs. It is used to be a command debug connect kit between Minecraft and external programs.
body:
# Command Debug Service ![follows](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/command-debug-service) ![latestVersion](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/command-debug-service) ![mcVersion](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/command-debug-service) ![modDownloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/command-debug-service) ## Introduction This mod is a subproject of [Command Debug DevKit](https://github.com/Jaffe2718/Command-Debug-DevKit). It is designed for optimized Minecraft command coding and debugging by connect to external editor or IDE. This Command Debug DevKit project is replacement of [Minecraft Command Studio](https://modrinth.com/mod/mccs) with more lightweight file size and better scalability, therefore, it is more suitable for develops to carry out secondary development.
## Setup 1. Install Minecraft with `Fabric`/`Quilt` Loader and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)/[Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) for your Minecraft version. 2. Download the mod. 3. Put the mod into your `mods` folder. ## Usage 1. My most recommanded approach is to use the [IntelliJ IDEA Plugin](https://github.com/Jaffe2718/Command-Debug-DevKit/releases) with this mod. So before using this mod, you should install [IntelliJ IDEA](https://www.jetbrains.com/idea/) Community or Ultimate, or install other JetBrains IDE except Rider. Then download the plugin from my [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/Jaffe2718/Command-Debug-DevKit/releases) or [JetBrains Marketplace](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/22587-minecraft-command-devkit).
2. Start your IDE, create or open a project, then create or open a file with suffix `.mcfunction`. 3. Start your Minecraft game and join a world. The mod will create two socket server and show the host and port information in the game chat. ![i1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9WacxUtO/images/9e6ffea12bf73029cc51f81b2373322d784ad8b1.png) 4. Connect to these two socket servers by entering the host and port which shown in the game chat. Then you can use the code completion and code execution service. ![i2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9WacxUtO/images/0b53437011193013013b48f5318d5300eeebe0d1.png) ![i3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9WacxUtO/images/eb1d0b4936ecfa0c8beb33604aeb34e8628f206c.png) ## Info This project is licensed under the MIT License. You can use this project for any purpose for free. See the [LICENSE](https://github.com/Jaffe2718/Command-Debug-DevKit/blob/2.x/LICENSE) file for details. Currently, this project is still in development. If you have any idea or suggestion, please open an issue or pull request. And the plugin is only for IntelliJ Platform IDEs, if you want to use other IDEs such as Eclipse and VSCode, you can create a plugin for it and pull request to this project. What's more, the mod is only for `Fabric` and `Quilt` currently, you can rewrite it for `Forge` or other mod loaders and pull request to this project. I will be very grateful if you can help me to improve this project. For more infomation, please visit [Command Debug DevKit](https://github.com/Jaffe2718/Command-Debug-DevKit)
